Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages

Class ClientToServerMessage

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.Message
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Network.Messages.ClientToServerMessage
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
CreateGameMessage, DrawMessage, GetColorAvailableMessage, GetGameListMessage, HeartBeatMessage, JoinGameMessage, ObjectiveCardChosenMessage, PickMessage, PlayCardMessage, sendChatMessage, WantThatColorMessage
public abstract class ClientToServerMessage extends Message implements Serializable
Represents a message sent from the client to the server. This abstract class should be extended by specific message types.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ClientToServerMessage

      public ClientToServerMessage(int clientID, Boolean isForServer)
      Constructs a new ClientToServerMessage.
      Parameters:
      clientID - the ID of the client sending the message
      isForServer - a boolean indicating if the message is intended for the server

  • Method Details

    • getClientID

      public int getClientID()
      Gets the client ID.
      Overrides:
      getClientID in class Message
      Returns:
      the client ID

    • execute

      public abstract void execute(Controller controller)
      Executes the action associated with this message on the given controller.
      Parameters:
      controller - the controller to execute the action on

    • isForServer

      public boolean isForServer()
      Checks if the message is intended for the server or for gameServerInstance.
      Returns:
      true if the message is for the server, false otherwise
